name: Spotube AltStore
subtitle: A personal AltStore source for Spotube
description: Spotube 5.1.2 repackaged with ad-hoc inner-framework signatures so AltStore can re-sign it with your Apple Account.

apps.name: Spotube
apps.subtitle: Open-source music streaming client
apps.localizedDescription: Spotube is an open-source music streaming client. This IPA has been repackaged for AltStore compatibility; AltStore signs it with your Apple Account during installation.

privacy.NSCameraUsageDescription: This app require access to the device camera
privacy.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: This app does not require access to the device microphone
privacy.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: This app require access to the photo library
